## Pipeline impact

- [ ] No changes to graph routing.
- [ ] Changes routing — diagram updated in README.
- [ ] No changes to public `/api/...` shape.
- [ ] Changes API shape — `QueryResponse` / endpoint table in README updated.
- [ ] Hallucination gate, correction loop, and web fallback semantics preserved.

## Tests

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes from `backend/` (60/60).
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds from `frontend/` with no source maps.
- [ ] New behaviour has unit-level coverage (or explain why not).

## Configuration

- [ ] No new environment variables.
- [ ] New env vars added to both `.env.example` and the **Environment Variables Reference** table in `README.md`.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is short and imperative.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or vendor lockfile churn unrelated to deps.
- [ ] Screenshots attached if UI changed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG / release notes are not required (we cut release notes from squashed commits).
